scripts.jekyll:install: bundle config set --local path 'vendor/bundle' && cross-env BUNDLE_GEMFILE=site/Gemfile bundle install
scripts.build: cross-env BUNDLE_GEMFILE=site/Gemfile bundle exec jekyll build --source site
scripts.start: cross-env BUNDLE_GEMFILE=site/Gemfile bundle exec jekyll serve --source site --port 6060 --trace --unpublished --livereload
